creator: jbacon@mcw.edu
text:
I tried building the AFNI port with the patch on FreeBSD 6.2 with the latest 
ports, and it failed, so I'll have to reject this patch.

cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -DFreeBSD -DNO_GAMMA -DUSE_TRACING -DHAVE_XDBE -DPIC -fPIC   -o 
SUMA_paperplane 
SUMA_paperplane.c -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I./ -I../ -I../niml/ -Igts/src  -I../nifti/niftilib -I../nifti/nifticdf -I../nifti/znzlib -I../3DEdge/src -L/usr/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L../ -lXm -lGLw -lGLU -lGL -lXmu -lXp -lXt -lXext -lX11 -lm -lz
/var/tmp//ccQEFHFM.o(.text+0xc12): In function `main':
: undefined reference to `glwDrawingAreaWidgetClass'
gmake[1]: *** [SUMA_paperplane] Error 1

Regards,

	-Jason
